plans.title: Test Plans
plans.name: Plan Name
plans.maxTokensDesc: Upper limit for generation. For models with 'Thinking' (e.g. R1), 512+ is recommended.
plans.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
plans.inheritHint: Empty fields will inherit values from the parent suite.
plans.cascadeDeleteWarning: Deleting "{{name}}" will also delete {{count}} child models. This cannot be undone.
plans.multiplierDesc: Test frequency for this model. Subsamples the parent suite's interval.
plans.actualIntervalDesc: This model will be tested every {{minutes}} minutes (suite interval {{parent}}m / multiplier {{mult}}).
plans.providerHelp: Tip: To manage multiple models, create a Provider suite first (leave Parent Suite empty), then add models under it.
plans.modelListPlaceholder:
One model name per line, e.g.:
gpt-4o
gpt-4-turbo

history.title: History
history.ttftDef: Time to First Token: Speed at which the first content character is received.
history.ttfbDef: Time to First Byte: Time until the first byte of response arrives.
history.ttfrDef: Time to First Reasoning: Time until the thinking chain starts.
history.thinkTimeDef: Total duration spent in the reasoning/thinking phase.
history.tpsOverallDef: Total Throughput: Total tokens / Total time.
history.tpsGenerateDef: Generation Throughput: Total tokens / (Total time - TTFT).
history.tpsContentDef: Content Throughput: Generation speed of the non-thinking part only.
history.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this test record?

settings.title: Settings
settings.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

status.title: System Status
status.compareDesc: Select up to 5 models to compare performance
status.noDataInRange: No data available for selected models in this range
status.clickCardToCompare: Click any card to add it to the comparison chart.
